Operation 'RcsDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what inputs are required (message ID), what the response contains, and the side effects (message cannot be sent after deletion). Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of prerequisites, effects, and irreversibility.

data.current_description: Delete a scheduled Rich Content Message
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a scheduled Rich Content Message
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a scheduled Rich Content Message by ID before it has been sent. Requires the message ID as a path parameter. Returns a confirmation response. Once deleted, the message cannot be sent and the operation cannot be reversed.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what inputs are required (message ID), what the response contains, and the side effects (message cannot be sent after deletion). Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of prerequisites, effects, and irreversibility.

message: Operation 'SmsDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about input format (how to specify which messages), response content, and constraints (only pending messages). Improved version clarifies request structure and state requirements for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Delete one or more SMS messages before they have been sent to prevent them from being sent.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes one or more SMS messages before they have been sent to prevent delivery. Accepts one or more message IDs in the request body. Returns a confirmation response indicating which messages were successfully deleted. Only messages in pending/scheduled state can be deleted.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about input format (how to specify which messages), response content, and constraints (only pending messages). Improved version clarifies request structure and state requirements for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'Status' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about input format (query parameters), response structure, and batch capability. Enhanced version specifies parameter format, response content (delivery state, timestamps, errors), and batch support for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves dispatch status for given SMS IDs
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the dispatch and delivery status for one or more SMS messages by their IDs. Accepts SMS message IDs as query parameters. Returns status information for each message including delivery state, timestamps, and any error details. Supports batch status queries.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about input format (query parameters), response structure, and batch capability. Enhanced version specifies parameter format, response content (delivery state, timestamps, errors), and batch support for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'ValidateForVoice' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about input format, response structure (approval states), and implications (how validation status affects delivery). Improved description helps AI agents understand validation outcomes and their consequences.

data.current_description: Validates the given phone number for the use of voice API
data.description_suggestion: Validates whether a phone number is eligible for use as a caller ID in the voice API. Accepts a phone number in the request body. Returns validation result indicating if the number is approved, pending, or rejected for voice messaging. Validation status may affect voice message delivery capabilities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about input format, response structure (approval states), and implications (how validation status affects delivery). Improved description helps AI agents understand validation outcomes and their consequences.

data.current_description: Retrieves analytics for the associated API key
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account analytics and usage metrics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves analytics and usage metrics for the associated API key. Supports filtering by date range and message type through query parameters. Returns aggregated statistics including message counts, delivery rates, and cost breakdowns for the specified period.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what analytics are returned and what parameters control the query. Enhanced summary to be more specific about analytics type, and description now explains parameter usage and expected output metrics for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieves outbound journals for the associated API key

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the outbound message journal containing sent SMS and voice messages for the associated API key. data.summary_suggestion: Lookup caller name and identity information

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves standardized phone number format information for a specified phone number. data.summary_suggestion: Check mobile phone status and location
data.description_suggestion: Performs a Home Location Register (HLR) lookup to retrieve real-time status and roaming information for a specified mobile phone number. Accepts a phone number as input and returns carrier information, roaming status, and network availability. Useful for validating active mobile numbers and determining if a number is reachable before sending SMS or voice messages.

data.summary_suggestion: Check mobile number carrier portability status
data.description_suggestion: Performs a Mobile Number Portability (MNP) lookup to determine if a phone number has been ported between carriers. Accepts a phone number as input and returns the current carrier, original carrier, portability status, and porting date if applicable. Useful for identifying number ownership and routing SMS or voice messages to the correct network operator.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what MNP lookup returns and why it matters. Enhanced to explain MNP purpose, expected input (phone number), specific output fields (current carrier, original carrier, status, date), and practical use case for routing communications correctly.

data.description_suggestion: Checks if a specified phone number supports Rich Content Services (RCS) messaging. data.current_description: Retrieves pricing information for a single country or all
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SMS and messaging service pricing information. Accepts an optional country code parameter to retrieve pricing for a specific country, or omit the parameter to retrieve pricing for all supported countries. Returns pricing per message, volume discounts, and any applicable surcharges. Use this to calculate costs before sending messages or to display pricing information to users.
